title: Assignment of 0 to for loop variable leads to a 1 in MSB

features.name: for loop with undersized constant initialization
features.description: Code should include a for loop where a multi-bit loop variable reg is initialized with a constant of smaller bit-width instead of the matching width

features.name: bit_select on for loop variable
features.description: Code should include a bit-select or part-select operation on a for loop variable within the loop body expression

features.name: multi_bit_reg_with_single_bit_initializer
features.description: Code should include a register declaration with explicit bit range [N:0] where a smaller bit-width constant is used for initialization
